codeReview.summary: Clean extraction of buildLegacyLogprobs() shared helper that converts TokenLogprob arrays to OpenAI legacy format. The refactor correctly deduplicates ~66 lines of inline formatting from both OpenAIRoutes.swift (non-streaming) and SSEEncoder.swift (streaming) into a single well-documented static method. The key bug fix addresses VAL-LEG-004: position 0 top_logprobs now correctly emits JSON null instead of empty dict {}. All VAL-LEG assertions (001-008) are properly handled. The implementation is correct, follows project conventions, and builds cleanly.

summary: PASS — The buildLegacyLogprobs() helper is correctly implemented with proper null handling for position 0 (VAL-LEG-002, VAL-LEG-004), cumulative UTF-8 byte offset computation via String.utf8.count (VAL-LEG-005), top_logprobs:0 minimal dict handling (VAL-LEG-006), and proper integration into both non-streaming and streaming completions paths. The refactor reduces 68 lines of duplicated logic to 89 lines of shared, well-documented code (net +21 lines, but -68 lines of duplication). No blocking or non-blocking issues found. Build succeeds with only pre-existing warnings.
